_comment: BASE_DELAY values for consequence queue scheduling. All values in ticks (1 tick = 1 in-game day). From GDD Section 10 / TDD Section 6.

whistleblower_emergence.description: Time for a dissatisfied worker to decide to act on knowledge

journalist_investigation_start.description: Time from receiving a tip to starting active investigation

regulator_investigation_start.description: Time from receiving complaint to opening formal investigation

law_enforcement_response.description: Time from evidence threshold to active investigation

community_response_stage_advance.description: Time for community response to advance one stage

evidence_decay.description: Recurring evidence actionability decay check interval; max_age_ticks = hard expiry for tokens that decay_rate=0 (prevents unbounded pool growth)

relationship_decay.description: Recurring NPC relationship decay batch interval

market_recompute.description: Market price recomputation (every tick for active markets)

legal_process_charge_to_trial.description: Time from charges filed to trial date

legislative_proposal_to_vote.description: Time from proposal introduction to committee vote
